deviations.description: The process model only restricts issuing SIM cards to customers with outstanding debt greater than 100 €, as indicated by the 'Debt < 100' gateway in the process diagram on page 1. The updated requirement prohibits issuing SIM cards to customers with outstanding debt exceeding 50 €. Therefore, the process allows issuing SIM cards to customers with debt between 50.01 € and 100 €, directly violating the stricter threshold in Version 2.
